title: Traction Motor overheating under full load
description: TM-4 winding temperature reached 108°C on uphill grade between Kiul and Jamalpur. Shed assistance requested.

timeline.remarks: Incident logged. Driver reported high heating alarms on instrument panel.

title: AI Health Alert: Transformer Winding Insulation Breakdown
description: AI diagnostic engine automatically triggered maintenance isolation. Reserved: Bay 2 (Heavy Repairs). Assigned tech: Vikram Singh. Root cause: Internal arcing caused by severe cellulose paper insulation decay in oil core.

timeline.remarks: Triggered by Autonomous AI Health Intelligence.
